content: Fix 3 TUI bugs: (1) only 'open' orders fetched in refresh_state, missing pending/partial_fill; (2) positions show wrong market name via .values().next(); (3) P&L aggregation misses pending/partial_fill statuses
Delegated bug fix task to Trading Lead with detailed fix instructions for all 3 bugs
Delegated all 3 bugs to Rust Engine Dev — single worker owns both arb-cli and arb-engine

Fixed all 3 bugs: (1) refresh_state loops over open/pending/partial_fill, (2a) market_names now inserts pair.id as key, (2b) draw_positions uses .get(&p.pair_id) instead of .values().next(), (3) aggregate_daily_pnl loops over all 6 statuses. cargo check + clippy clean.
All 3 fixes complete, build clean. Ready for Engineering Code Review.
Delegated code review to Engineering Lead for cross-team review of Trading team fixes
Delegated review to Code Reviewer — cross-team review for Trading team's arb-cli and arb-engine changes

APPROVE. All 4 fix points verified correct. Clippy clean. One informational note: list_orders_by_status has no date filter so trades_executed may count previous days (pre-existing issue, not introduced by these fixes).
Code Review: APPROVE. No blocking findings. Ready to merge.
All 3 TUI bugs fixed and code-reviewed. APPROVE with no blocking findings.
